findings.message: 'Comprehensively' in description is a vague quantifier — replace with a measurable scope such as 'Reviews across 9 rule sets'
'modern API usage' — 'modern' is undefined without a version anchor
'written optimally' — 'optimally' is unmeasurable; no criterion given for what optimal means
'configured correctly' — 'correctly' is in R01's explicit vague list; replace with a structural rule
'relevant reference files' — 'relevant' is in R01's explicit vague list; ambiguous about which files to load
'consistent project structure' — 'consistent' is unmeasurable without naming the structure
'relevant line(s)' in Output Format — 'relevant' is in R01's explicit vague list
'brief before/after code fix' — 'brief' is unmeasurable; no line-count guidance given

Root-level SKILL.md has skill frontmatter (name: swiftui-pro, version: 1.1) but is not registered in plugin.json (skills: ./skills/); it is silently ignored by the plugin system and uses bare relative paths instead of ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR} so references would fail if loaded standalone
